# Smart Media — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Smart Media is an ultra-premium Israeli digital marketing agency positioning itself as a futuristic, American-standard powerhouse in a local market dominated by low-quality agencies. The brand identity fuses cyberpunk aesthetics with elite B2B authority — think quantum computing meets Madison Avenue. Their core narrative is bringing US-level SLAs, AI-driven strategies, and hyper-advanced analytics to Israeli SMBs, with a prophetic, ROI-obsessed tone. Services span paid ads (Google, Meta, TikTok), conversion-optimized web builds, generative AI creative production (videos, images, logos), and full-service CMO-level partnerships under a 6-month strategic commitment model.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://smart-media-78db152f.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://smart-media-78db152f.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Smart Media
Smart Media is an ultra-premium Israeli digital marketing agency positioning itself as a futuristic, American-standard powerhouse in a local market dominated by low-quality agencies. The brand identity fuses cyberpunk aesthetics with elite B2B authority — think quantum computing meets Madison Avenue. Their core narrative is bringing US-level SLAs, AI-driven strategies, and hyper-advanced analytics to Israeli SMBs, with a prophetic, ROI-obsessed tone. Services span paid ads (Google, Meta, TikTok), conversion-optimized web builds, generative AI creative production (videos, images, logos), and full-service CMO-level partnerships under a 6-month strategic commitment model.

## Services/Products
- Quantum Ad-Management (Google, Meta, TikTok)
- High-Convert Web Nodes (sales websites & landing pages)
- Generative AI Creative Studio (AI videos, images, logos)
- End-to-End Client Accommodation (full CMO partnership)

## Target Audience
- Israeli SMBs (small and medium-sized businesses)
- בעלי עסקים קטנים ובינוניים
- סטארטאפים טכנולוגיים פרימיום
- קמעונאים בתחום היוקרה

## Industry
Digital Marketing
